prompt: A dramatic mountain landscape at dusk, seen from the side, showing rugged peaks and deep valleys. A glowing golden trail of light traces a path from a high peak on the left, bouncing and zigzagging downward through the valleys, oscillating and converging toward the lowest valley floor on the right where a soft blue light rests. The trail starts bright yellow, shifts to orange mid-journey, and ends in cool blue at the final resting point. No text, no labels, no diagrams — purely a physical landscape with a luminous descent path.
model: Custom Python/Pillow/NumPy generative art (procedural terrain + gradient descent simulation)
metaphor: A glowing stone rolling down a hilly landscape follows the slope downward at each step, overshooting valleys and oscillating before settling at the lowest point — exactly mirroring iterative parameter updates minimizing a loss function.
